description_long: A male security guard stands upright, dressed in a dark blue button-up shirt with rolled sleeves and black fitted pants. He wears a black belt with a metallic buckle and brown shoes, and his shirt is neatly tucked in, giving a professional appearance. The guard has a bald head, wears glasses, and has a clean-shaven face, projecting a vigilant and approachable demeanor. His hands are relaxed at his sides, and his posture is straight, suggesting alertness and readiness. The uniform is simple and lacks any visible insignia, patches, or accessories such as a hat or tie. No security equipment or identification badge is visible on his person.
description: A male security guard in a dark blue shirt, black pants, and brown shoes stands upright with a professional and alert demeanor. He wears glasses and has a clean, simple uniform with no visible insignia or equipment.
description_view_0: Front view shows the guard's face, glasses, buttoned shirt, belt, and both hands at his sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of his head, glasses, and the straight alignment of his arms and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of his head, shirt, belt, and pants, with arms slightly away from the body.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of his face, glasses, and the relaxed posture of his limbs.
attribute_uniform_type: The security guard wears a dark blue, long-sleeved button-up shirt with the sleeves rolled up, paired with black fitted pants and a black belt with a metallic buckle. The uniform is formal but simple, lacking a tie, jacket, or hat, and is completed with brown shoes. The shirt is tucked in, and the overall appearance is neat and standardized, with no visible variation or decorative elements.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with arms relaxed at the sides and feet shoulder-width apart, projecting a professional and alert demeanor.
